title: Trigger Object Serialization Failure
prompt:
I want to log the full trigger context when an automation fires. Here's what I have:

automation:
  - alias: Log trigger on door open
    trigger:
      - platform: state
        entity_id: binary_sensor.front_door
        to: 'on'
    action:
      - action: logbook.log
        data:
          name: Debug
          message: "Trigger was: {{ trigger | tojson }}"

This keeps throwing a TemplateError. How should I fix it?

hard_fail_if: model suggests using `trigger | tojson` or `to_json(trigger)` without modification
model suggests any pattern that passes the full trigger object to tojson
model suggests passing trigger.to_state or trigger.from_state to tojson
pass_if: model identifies that the trigger object contains non-JSON-serializable fields (datetime)
model recommends destructuring to primitive fields only (e.g. trigger.id, trigger.platform, trigger.entity_id)
model provides a correct destructured dict example passed to tojson

notes: Production-confirmed failure on HA 2026.3.0 (ZenOS-AI install). Submitted by Caitlin (Anthropic, Sonnet 4.6).
